summary: MoeGo Parity Phase 2 testing completed successfully. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All 3 new frontend pages (Lodging Map, Check-In/Out, Booking Approvals) load correctly and are accessible from Admin Dashboard.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests use existing kennels data (7 kennels: 2 runs, 2 suites, 3 crates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MoeGo Phase 2 testing complete. All APIs working: /api/moego/bookings/smart, /api/moego/operations/check-ins, /api/moego/operations/check-outs, /api/moego/operations/baths-due, /api/moego/bookings/pending-approval. Frontend pages: LodgingMapPage, CheckInOutPage, BookingApprovalPage all accessible from Admin Dashboard.

features: Visual kennel grid with status colors (green=available, red=occupied)
Grouped by type (Runs, Suites, Crates, Luxury)
Date picker for viewing different dates
Three tabs: Check-Ins, Check-Outs, Baths Due
Quick stats cards (Pending Check-Ins, Pending Check-Outs, Baths Due Today, Completed Today)
Date picker for viewing different dates
Empty state when no pending approvals

endpoints_tested: POST /api/moego/bookings/smart - Smart booking with eligibility checks

tests: Check-ins requires staff or admin role

ui_screenshots.admin_dashboard: Shows all navigation cards including Phase 2 cards
ui_screenshots.lodging_map: Visual kennel grid with 7 kennels grouped by type, all available
ui_screenshots.check_in_out: Tabs for check-ins/outs/baths with stats cards

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend implementations
